At this point, the server notifies all app users and if you live not too close the epicentre you can take action before the quake reaches you. Notification process can take up to 10 seconds to cover all users. Now you can buy a priority in order to be among the first 100, 1'000 or 10'000 people notified. If you buy the yearly subscription you save 2 months. This project is not funded and the money collected are use to run and to improve the service.
